# **FEIHONG** Design System

### *Timeless Vision, Crafted with Precision*
#### 不像AI的个人品牌设计系统 — 艺术有品质，有温度有人味

[![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/version-v7.1-0A2463?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=0A2463&color=F4D35E)](https://github.com/ifeihong/feihong-design-system)

> **Premium personal brand design system for AI-assisted creation.** Built on the signature palette of Royal Blue `#0A2463` + Vintage Gold `#F4D35E` + Burgundy Wine `#D8315B`, with a strict serif+sans-serif typography strategy. Produce pages that are artistically refined, recognizably yours, and unmistakably human — never looking AI-generated.
>
> **为 AI 编码助手打造的高端个人品牌设计 Skill。** 皇家蓝 + 复古金 + 酒红三色基因，衬线+无衬线字体混搭策略，148个品牌组件，19个科学分类，250+种样式变体，8步精工工作流。

---

## ◆ v7.0 Highlights

- ◆ **FEIHONG Brand Identity** — 全大写品牌标识，高奢国际化视觉语言，Art Deco几何装饰语言
- ◆ **10 Production-Ready Scenes** — Portfolio / Landing / Tutorial / Deck / Case Study / App / Social Cards / Resume / WeChat / Email
- ✦ **148 Components · 19 Categories · 250+ Variants** — 含42个动态文字标题、25个高奢艺术组件、10+签名组件
- 📜 **Signature Collection** — Wax Seal火漆印章、Photo Corner照片角贴、Fleuron ❦花饰、Drop Cap首字下沉、Gold Signature金色签名
- 🎬 **Motion Language** — 统一Feihong Easing缓动曲线，完整动效规范（见MOTION.md）
- ✅ **Quality Seal Standards** — P0 Seal Required / P1 Quality Expected / P2 Refinement Bonus，含Anti-AI Detection专项检查
- 🚀 **FEIHONG 8-Step Process** — Discover → Define → Inject DNA → Structure → Compose → Signature → Refine → Seal & Deliver

---

## ◆ Why FEIHONG · 差异化优势

| Feature | Generic Templates | AI-Generated Pages | **FEIHONG** |
|:---|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| Zero default browser styles | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ Every component branded |
| Anti-AI detection built-in | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ 10-point Anti-AI checklist |
| Signature visual language | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ Wax Seal, Photo Corner, Fleuron ❦, Drop Cap |
| Motion design system | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ Feihong Easing, duration scale, principles |
| Serif + sans-serif mix | ❌ | Usually single font | ✅ Playfair + Inter + Cormorant + JetBrains Mono |
| Color precision | Approximate | Random | ✅ Exact HEX, 55-30-15 ratio, 9-level scales |
| Quality gate | None | None | ✅ P0/P1/P2 three-tier seal standards |
| 42 animated text components | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ Velvet Drip, Diamond Sparkle, Liquid Gold... |
| 10 ready-to-use scene templates | Limited | Generic | ✅ 10 scenes, all production-ready |
| Motion reduced-motion support | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ Full accessibility compliance |

## 🎨 Signature Palette · 品牌三色基因

| Color | HEX | Ratio | Character | Usage |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---|:---|
| <div style="width:24px;height:24px;background:#0A2463;border-radius:4px;display:inline-block"></div> Royal Blue 皇家蓝 | `#0A2463` | **55%** | Authority, Depth, Trust | Primary brand, headlines, navigation, dark panels |
| <div style="width:24px;height:24px;background:#F4D35E;border-radius:4px;display:inline-block"></div> Vintage Gold 复古金 | `#F4D35E` | **30%** | Elegance, Craft, Distinction | Accents, decorative lines, badges, highlights, signatures |
| <div style="width:24px;height:24px;background:#D8315B;border-radius:4px;display:inline-block"></div> Burgundy Wine 酒红 | `#D8315B` | **15%** | Passion, Sophistication, Signature | CTA buttons, key labels, emotional emphasis |

> Background: warm cream `#FDFBF6` · Text: ink black `#0D1225` · **No pure black or pure white on large areas.** Terminal Green `#4ADE80` restricted to code/terminal scenes only.

## ◇ Ten Scenes · 十大场景

| N° | Scene | Template | Core Features |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---|
| 01 | **Portfolio / Personal Site** | [`portfolio.html`](assets/portfolio.html) | Asymmetric Hero, Bento grid, Wax Seal, Photo Corner, editorial feel |
| 02 | **Landing Page** | [`landing.html`](assets/landing.html) | Timeline, speakers, countdown, CTA forms, conversion-driven |
| 03 | **Tutorial / Long-form** | [`tutorial.html`](assets/tutorial.html) | Drop cap, reading progress, TOC sidebar, Fleuron ❦ dividers |
| 04 | **Presentation Deck** | [`deck.html`](assets/deck.html) | 9 layouts, keyboard nav, F fullscreen, print mode, Keynote-level |
| 05 | **Case Study** | [`case-study.html`](assets/case-study.html) | Narrative arc: problem→solution→result, data viz, dark panels |
| 06 | **App / Dashboard** | [`app.html`](assets/app.html) | Sidebar nav, Terminal Green code blocks, functional UI, KPI cards |
| 07 | **Social Cards (Xiaohongshu)** | [`cards.html`](assets/cards.html) | 3:4 portrait, pagination, html2canvas PNG export, 6 layouts |
| 08 | **Resume / CV** | [`resume.html`](assets/resume.html) | A4 print ready, Ctrl+P PDF, single page, no animation |
| 09 | **WeChat Article** | [`wechat.html`](assets/wechat.html) | Inline styles, table layout, WeChat editor compatible |
| 10 | **Email / EDM** | [`email.html`](assets/email.html) | Table layout, inline styles, Outlook compatible, unsubscribe link |

### Signature Collection · 签名组件（核心特色）

| Component | Effect | Usage |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Wax Seal** | 3D circular badge, burgundy/gold/royal | Portfolio certification, Landing badge, visual anchor |
| **Photo Corner** | L-shaped gold corner accents | Portfolio images, avatar frames, Hero images |
| **Fleuron ❦** | Classical section divider | Paragraph breaks, section transitions |
| **Drop Cap** | Enlarged first letter of article | Tutorial/long-form opening paragraph |
| **Gold Signature** | Italic gold underline script | Article endings, Footer byline |
| **Chapter Opening** | Large numeral + fleuron + title | Deck section dividers, long article chapters |
| **N° Serial Badge** | Numbered luxury badge | Item numbering, limited edition feel |
| **Gold Line Accent** | Short gold horizontal rule | Beneath headlines, content grouping |

## 🚀 Quick Start · 快速开始

### 1. Installation · 安装

Place the entire `feihong-design-system` folder into your AI assistant's Skills directory:

```
<skills-directory>/
└── feihong-design-system/
    ├── FEIHONG.md          ← Workflow manual (read by AI)
    ├── DNA.md              ← Brand DNA (colors/typography/character)
    ├── MOTION.md           ← Motion language specification
    ├── QUALITY.md          ← Quality seal standards (P0/P1/P2)
    ├── index.html          ← Homepage & template index
    ├── assets/             ← Templates & static assets
    ├── components/         ← Component library (19 files)
    └── scenes/             ← Scene specifications
```

### 2. Personalization · 首次配置

1. Open `DNA.md`, replace brand name, tagline, and social links
2. Place your avatar in `assets/avatar.jpg` (square, minimum 400×400px)
3. If you have a full IP character (full-body/half-body/three-view), place in `assets/character.png`
4. Fine-tune the character keywords and taboo list to match your personal aesthetic

### 3. Usage · 使用方式

Describe your needs in natural language to your AI assistant:

```
"Use FEIHONG Design System to create a Landing Page for my course workshop"
"Build a personal portfolio homepage with asymmetric Hero and Bento project grid"
"Write a tutorial article about design systems with editorial typography"
"Create a presentation deck about personal brand building"
```

The AI automatically: identifies the scene → reads specifications → modifies from template → selects components → self-checks against Quality Seal → delivers.

│

## 🛠️ FEIHONG 8-Step Process · 工作流

### Fast Track · 快速路径（Simple Modifications）
1. Read existing HTML
2. Apply changes per `DNA.md`
3. Quick P0 verification
4. Deliver

### Full Process · 完整8步（New Pages / Complete Designs）
1. **N°01 Discover · 洞察需求** — Assess information completeness, adaptive triage
2. **N°02 Define · 定调定向** — Ask only the missing critical questions
3. **N°03 Inject DNA · 品牌注入** — Read DNA.md + MOTION.md + corresponding scene spec
4. **N°04 Structure · 架构搭建** — Start from the matching scene template (never from zero)
5. **N°05 Compose · 组件编排** — Set emotional tone, Hero strategy, signature elements, rhythm plan
6. **N°06 Signature · 签名点睛** — Select components, zero default browser styles
7. **N°07 Refine · 精工细作** — Self-check against QUALITY.md: P0 must pass, P1 should pass
8. **N°08 Seal & Deliver · 封印交付** — Seal of quality, deliver with signature notes

---

## 🚫 Core Bottom Line · 核心底线（Anti-AI）

**Mission: A screenshot shared to any social platform must never trigger "that's AI-generated."**

### Absolutely Forbidden · 绝对禁止
- ❌ Glassmorphism / backdrop-blur effects
- ❌ Blue-purple gradients, cyan, neon colors
- ❌ Gradient text (`background-clip: text`)
- ❌ Bounce/Elastic animations
- ❌ AI glow effects (conic gradients + bloom + sweep)
- ❌ Generic centered card grids (all cards equal size)
- ❌ Inter/Roboto/Arial as single font throughout (must mix serif + sans)
- ❌ Browser default blockquote / ul / a styles
- ❌ Pure black `#000` or pure white `#FFF` on large areas
- ❌ All sections using identical layout (must alternate density)
- ❌ Gray-black shadows (must use blue-tinted shadows)

### Must Include (at least one) · 必须包含
- ✅ Playfair Display / Cormorant Garamond serif italic
- ✅ Extreme typography contrast (headlines ≥2.5rem, body ≤1.1rem)
- ✅ Asymmetric layout (at least one section breaks symmetry)
- ✅ Gold `#F4D35E` signature details (decorative lines, badges, underlines)
- ✅ At least one Signature Collection component (Wax Seal / Photo Corner / Fleuron / Drop Cap)
- ✅ Blue-tinted shadows (not pure gray/black)
- ✅ Feihong Easing `cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)` for all animations

---

## 🔤 Typography · 字体系统

All fonts are **open-source and free for commercial use** (SIL Open Font License 1.1 / Apache 2.0):

| Role | Typeface | Character |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Headlines / Display | **Playfair Display** | High-contrast serif, elegant, editorial quality |
| Decorative / Italic / Quotes | **Cormorant Garamond** | Delicate serif italic, literary warmth |
| Body / UI | **Inter** | Modern geometric sans, optimal screen reading |
| Code / Monospace | **JetBrains Mono** | Developer-friendly monospace, terminal aesthetic |
| Chinese Serif | **Noto Serif SC** | Source Han Serif, pairs with Playfair |
| Chinese Sans | **Noto Sans SC** | Source Han Sans, pairs with Inter |

---

## 🎬 Motion Language · 动效规范

All animations follow the FEIHONG Motion Language defined in `MOTION.md`:

- **Feihong Easing**: `cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)` — fast start, gentle deceleration, natural settle
- **Duration Scale**: Micro 150-200ms / SM 250-350ms / MD 400-600ms / LG 800-1200ms / Ambient 3-6s
- **Three Principles**: Purposeful · Elegant · Restrained (max 3 simultaneous animations per screen)
- **Reduced Motion**: Full `prefers-reduced-motion` support for accessibility

## 🔍 SEO Optimization

This project includes complete SEO optimization out of the box:

- ✅ Semantic HTML5 tag structure
- ✅ Open Graph / Twitter Card metadata
- ✅ JSON-LD structured data (SoftwareSourceCode + ItemList)
- ✅ `robots.txt` + `sitemap.xml`
- ✅ Canonical URL configuration
- ✅ Chinese keyword optimization
- ✅ Semantic heading hierarchy (h1-h6)
- ✅ Image alt attributes
- ✅ Accessible focus-visible styles
